notes: Using the D3d11 env var, runs and displays absolutely great but hangs up after 2 to 5 minutes of gameplay (3 tries)
title: Life is Feudal: Forest Village
Life is Feudal: Forest Village

notes: Used Proton 4.2-3 out of the Box with Nvidia 418.56 drivers (latest as of this review). Colors seems a bit off, but besides that it runs rather smooth. 60FPS with rare drops to about 42 FPS. With normal Game Speed it runs very smooth, stutters a bit when Game Speed is set to 2x or faster. The faster the Game Speed, the more stutter you get while still maintaining about 60 FPS. Grass (Particles?) gets all placed facing the same directions, so you will see some kind of a Grid when zoomed in.
title: Life is Feudal: Forest Village

notes:
How to start:
1. Copy user_settings.py from user_settings.example.py (~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton 4.2).
2. Uncomment line with "PROTON_USE_WINED3D": "1"
3. Save file & start game
title: Life is Feudal: Forest Village

notes: Its playable, but it crashs every 10 or 15 minutes. You need to save the game manualy after you had load a game. Then it will run better.
title: Life is Feudal: Forest Village
